Build.description: The newly created build resource, including a unique build IDs and status.

UploadCredentials.description: This element is returned only when the operation is called without a storage location. It contains credentials to use when you are uploading a build file to an Amazon S3 bucket that is owned by Amazon GameLift Servers. Credentials have a limited life span. To refresh these credentials, call RequestUploadCredentials.

StorageLocation.description: Amazon S3 location for your game build file, including bucket name and key.

Script.description: The newly created script record with a unique script ID and ARN. The new script's storage location reflects an Amazon S3 location: (1) If the script was uploaded from an S3 bucket under your account, the storage location reflects the information that was provided in the CreateScript request; (2) If the script file was uploaded from a local zip file, the storage location reflects an S3 location controls by the Amazon GameLift Servers service.

GameServer.description: Object that describes the newly claimed game server.

ContainerFleet.description: The properties for the new container fleet, including current status. All fleets are initially placed in PENDING status.

ContainerGroupDefinition.description: The properties of the new container group definition resource. You can use this resource to create a container fleet.

FleetAttributes.description: The properties for the new fleet, including the current status. All fleets are placed in NEW status on creation.

LocationStates.description: The fleet's locations and life-cycle status of each location. For new fleets, the status of all locations is set to NEW. During fleet creation, Amazon GameLift Servers updates each location status as instances are deployed there and prepared for game hosting. This list includes an entry for the fleet's home Region. For fleets with no remote locations, only one entry, representing the home Region, is returned.

FleetId.description: A unique identifier for the fleet that was updated with new locations.

FleetArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that is assigned to a Amazon GameLift Servers fleet resource and uniquely identifies it. ARNs are unique across all Regions. Format is arn:aws:gamelift:<region>::fleet/fleet-a1234567-b8c9-0d1e-2fa3-b45c6d7e8912.

LocationStates.description: The remote locations that are being added to the fleet, and the life-cycle status of each location. For new locations, the status is set to NEW. During location creation, Amazon GameLift Servers updates each location's status as instances are deployed there and prepared for game hosting. This list does not include the fleet home Region or any remote locations that were already added to the fleet.

GameServerGroup.description: The newly created game server group object, including the new ARN value for the Amazon GameLift Servers FleetIQ game server group and the object's status. The Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling group ARN is initially null, since the group has not yet been created. This value is added once the game server group status reaches ACTIVE.

GameSession.description: Object that describes the newly created game session record.

GameSessionQueue.description: An object that describes the newly created game session queue.

Location.description: The details of the custom location you created.

Configuration.description: Object that describes the newly created matchmaking configuration.

PlayerSession.description: Object that describes the newly created player session record.

PlayerSessions.description: A collection of player session objects created for the added players.

VpcPeeringAuthorization.description: Details on the requested VPC peering authorization, including expiration.

FleetId.description: A unique identifier for the fleet that location attributes are being deleted for.

FleetArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that is assigned to a Amazon GameLift Servers fleet resource and uniquely identifies it. ARNs are unique across all Regions. Format is arn:aws:gamelift:<region>::fleet/fleet-a1234567-b8c9-0d1e-2fa3-b45c6d7e8912.

LocationStates.description: The remote locations that are being deleted, with each location status set to DELETING.

GameServerGroup.description: An object that describes the deleted game server group resource, with status updated to DELETE_SCHEDULED.

Name.description: A descriptive label that is associated with a fleet's scaling policy. Policy names do not need to be unique.

Compute.description: The details of the compute resource you registered.

GameServer.description: Object that describes the newly registered game server.

UploadCredentials.description: Amazon Web Services credentials required when uploading a game build to the storage location. These credentials have a limited lifespan and are valid only for the build they were issued for.

StorageLocation.description: Amazon S3 path and key, identifying where the game build files are stored.

FleetId.description: The fleet identifier that the alias is pointing to.

FleetArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) associated with the GameLift fleet resource that this alias points to.

GameServerGroup.description: An object that describes the game server group resource, with the SuspendedActions property updated to reflect the resumed activity.

FleetId.description: A unique identifier for the fleet to restart actions on.

FleetArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that is assigned to a Amazon GameLift Servers fleet resource and uniquely identifies it. ARNs are unique across all Regions. Format is arn:aws:gamelift:<region>::fleet/fleet-a1234567-b8c9-0d1e-2fa3-b45c6d7e8912.

GameSessionPlacement.description: Object that describes the newly created game session placement. This object includes all the information provided in the request, as well as start/end time stamps and placement status.

MatchmakingTicket.description: Ticket representing the backfill matchmaking request. This object includes the information in the request, ticket status, and match results as generated during the matchmaking process.
Ticket representing the matchmaking request. This object include the information included in the request, ticket status, and match results as generated during the matchmaking process.

FleetId.description: A unique identifier for the fleet to stop actions on.

FleetArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that is assigned to a Amazon GameLift Servers fleet resource and uniquely identifies it. ARNs are unique across all Regions. Format is arn:aws:gamelift:<region>::fleet/fleet-a1234567-b8c9-0d1e-2fa3-b45c6d7e8912.

GameSessionPlacement.description: Object that describes the canceled game session placement, with CANCELLED status and an end time stamp.

GameServerGroup.description: An object that describes the game server group resource, with the SuspendedActions property updated to reflect the suspended activity.

GameSession.description:
Properties describing a game session.

A game session in ACTIVE status can host players. When a game session ends, its status is set to TERMINATED.

Amazon GameLift Servers retains a game session resource for 30 days after the game session ends. You can reuse idempotency token values after this time. Game session logs are retained for 14 days.

All APIs by task

ContainerFleet.description: A collection of container fleet objects for all fleets that match the request criteria.

ContainerGroupDefinition.description: The properties of the updated container group definition version.

FleetId.description: A unique identifier for the fleet that was updated.

FleetArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that is assigned to a Amazon GameLift Servers fleet resource and uniquely identifies it. ARNs are unique across all Regions. Format is arn:aws:gamelift:<region>::fleet/fleet-a1234567-b8c9-0d1e-2fa3-b45c6d7e8912.

FleetId.description: A unique identifier for the fleet that was updated.

FleetArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that is assigned to a Amazon GameLift Servers fleet resource and uniquely identifies it. ARNs are unique across all Regions. Format is arn:aws:gamelift:<region>::fleet/fleet-a1234567-b8c9-0d1e-2fa3-b45c6d7e8912.

Location.description: The remote location being updated, expressed as an Amazon Web Services Region code, such as us-west-2.

FleetId.description: A unique identifier for the fleet that was updated.

FleetArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that is assigned to a Amazon GameLift Servers fleet resource and uniquely identifies it. ARNs are unique across all Regions. Format is arn:aws:gamelift:<region>::fleet/fleet-a1234567-b8c9-0d1e-2fa3-b45c6d7e8912.

GameServer.description: Object that describes the newly updated game server.

GameServerGroup.description: An object that describes the game server group resource with updated properties.

GameSessionQueue.description: An object that describes the newly updated game session queue.

RuntimeConfiguration.description: The runtime configuration currently in use by computes in the fleet. If the update is successful, all property changes are shown.

Script.description: The newly created script record with a unique script ID. The new script's storage location reflects an Amazon S3 location: (1) If the script was uploaded from an S3 bucket under your account, the storage location reflects the information that was provided in the CreateScript request; (2) If the script file was uploaded from a local zip file, the storage location reflects an S3 location controls by the Amazon GameLift Servers service.

Valid.description: A response indicating whether the rule set is valid.
